sections.content:
Save resumes and application data

Allow LinkedIn to save your resumes and answers to application questions. You may change your answers with each application. Learn more about saved application data

On
Allow LinkedIn to save your resumes and answers

Share resume data with hirers

Hirers can view skills and experiences from the resumes you choose to share when they search and view profiles and evaluate applicants through LinkedIn’s hiring tools. Learn more about shared resume data

On
Allow recruiters to view your resumes
Jamie (Yi-Chieh) Cheng's Resume_2026.pdf

Last used on 5/22/2026

Show
Allow LinkedIn to save your resumes and answers to application questions. You may change your answers with each application. Learn more about saved application data

Hirers can view skills and experiences from the resumes you choose to share when they search and view profiles and evaluate applicants through LinkedIn’s hiring tools. Learn more about shared resume data

Allow LinkedIn to save personal demographic information that you submit with job applications. It won’t be shown on your profile. Learn more about saved application data
You may also have saved personal demographic information via Self-ID on LinkedIn. Manage your personal demographic information
